summary: Iteration 185 testing complete: Biometrics Avenue (4th Mastery Avenue), Expanded Math Challenges (8→19), Fractal Completion Bonus. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). Fixed missing Flower2 and Shield icon imports in MasteryAvenues.js. All frontend UI elements verified with correct data-testid attributes.
critical_code_review_comments: avenues.py now has 4 avenues: mathematics, art, thought, biometrics (The Sentinel)
Biometrics generates Kinetic Dust that converts 1:1 to Cosmic Dust
Heart rate bonus: 1.5x dust when BPM is within target range for activity
8 activity types: walking, cycling, running, yoga, martial_arts, dance, gym, meditation
Mathematics expanded from 8 to 19 challenges: added algebra, trigonometry, calculus, number theory
Fractal Completion Bonus: 20 XP per sub-layer when all sub-layers in a depth are explored
Combined tier calculation changed from /600 to /800 (4 avenues now)
resonance-check and master-view/audit now include biometrics in totals
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 185 Biometrics Avenue and expanded Math challenges all working. Test user has: consciousness_level=1, explored sublayers in crust. Biometrics activities logged: walking (with HR bonus), cycling. Math challenges have known answers: imaginary_unit=-1, unit_circle=1, derivative_x_squared=3x2, integral_constant=c, e_value=2.72, limit_sinx_x=1, prime_infinity=infinitely, perfect_number=6, quadratic_discriminant=1, binomial_expansion=6, pythagorean_identity=1. Fixed missing Flower2 and Shield imports in MasteryAvenues.js (was causing page crash).

backend_apis.GET /api/avenues/overview: Returns 4 avenues including biometrics with color #10B981
backend_apis.GET /api/avenues/biometrics/activities: Returns 8 activity types with kinetic_dust_per_unit, resonance_per_session, target_bpm
backend_apis.POST /api/avenues/biometrics/log: Logs activity, generates kinetic dust, converts to cosmic dust 1:1
backend_apis.POST /api/avenues/biometrics/log with HR: 1.5x dust when heart_rate in target BPM range
backend_apis.GET /api/avenues/biometrics/stats: Returns resonance, kinetic_dust_total, by_activity breakdown, history
backend_apis.GET /api/avenues/resonance-check: Includes biometrics in total resonance and equilibrium
backend_apis.GET /api/master-view/audit: mastery_avenues includes biometrics with kinetic_dust field

bug_fixed.issue: MasteryAvenues.js crashed with 'ReferenceError: Flower is not defined'
bug_fixed.root_cause: Flower and Shield icons were used in ACTIVITY_ICONS mapping but not imported from lucide-react
bug_fixed.fix: Added Flower2 and Shield to the import statement from lucide-react, changed Flower to Flower2
